name: CYBERGUN SA EO 3,80
summary: CYBERGUN SA is a French company specializing in the design, development, and distribution of replica firearms for recreational and training purposes. They hold licenses with various firearm manufacturers to produce realistic airsoft and airgun versions of their products, marketing to both consumers and law enforcement agencies. Headquartered in France, CYBERGUN SA operates internationally, offering a range of products designed for simulation and collection.
